actions.intent: Start with the lower puppy's water-facing route instead of the safe upper puppy.
Open the lower puppy's right side with a clean route group.
Clear the lower route center and bring the priority puppy close to extraction.
Use safe side material while keeping the lower route first.
Convert the lower route before water pressure tightens.
Stabilize the board after the first rescue setup.
Pivot upward only after the lower puppy has been secured.
Open the upper puppy's remaining route cleanly.
Prepare the final upper extraction without unnecessary side clearing.
Finish the safer upper puppy after proving lower-first priority.

notes: Designer golden for the first water-order teach: lower puppy first, then the safer upper puppy.
